description: Composition:Olive green round neck t-shirt in 100% cotton with bold chest printWashcare:1. Machine wash separately in cold water 2. Use mild detergent 3. Do not bleach 4. Avoid soaking Remove promptly 5. Line dry inside out in shade 6. Warm iron only 7. Do not iron directly on print/embroideryFitting:Comfort FitIf karma is what you believe in as the foundation of your existence, then this tee from tantra is a great way to broadcast your belief. Team this t-shirt with jeans or cargoes the next time you go out with friends and use this as a cheeky reminder to stay good.  Model's Statistics:1. The model wears size M in t-shirts2. Height-6', Shoulders-18"
